'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=7zaMcVj4.x4IvgLygyQ5MN_XaeRrD_zSKqtVw5U_mvk-1772691904-1.0.1.1-WC50qBYRK96skObbQqC0q1s2k78sC4lWaZVmFoI6Rfk"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
